creator: wynkoop@wynn.com
text:
Greeting-

They are where you pointed me, and in fact I found that path by walking
about the ftp server after I put in the PR, but I believe this is still
a small bug because that is the location of older releases and it is
the location one comes to easily if one steps up the tree from the
AMD64 directory.

I would think either a README saying where 9.x is found or a symlink
might be a good thing.

Thanks for the response!

-Brett
--

and bear arms is, as a last resort, to protect themselves against
